run_summary.summary: Apr 17 scan (third pass). One new update: SOJOS — Ruby replied confirming she updated the contract with Kenny's requested dates (Video 1 draft by Apr 23, Video 2 in May). Contract is ready for Kenny/Liz to review and sign. Aqara and Flexsteel updates carried forward from second-pass run (Aqara reel confirmed live, ready to invoice; Flexsteel timeline notes from Ian/Popfly). Skipped: HULALA HOME (gifted/product-only, no cash value mentioned).

suggestions.message: Ruby updated the agreement with Kenny's requested dates — Video 1 draft by Apr 23, Video 2 in May. Review and sign the updated contract ASAP so Liz can start filming!
Reel went live Apr 16 — Liz confirmed and shared the link. Time to send the invoice!

Ian (Popfly) is nudging on the last video timeline — he's hoping it can wrap before May 12 (when Kenny's parents fly home). Kenny told him ~May 15 week. Worth a quick reply to Ian on which Steinhafels location they're visiting Apr 23.

deals.next_action: Review updated SOJOS agreement and sign — Ruby revised dates to Video 1 draft 4/23, Video 2 in May
deals.notes: [Apr 17]: Ruby confirmed contract updated with Kenny's requested dates (Video 1 draft by 4/23, Video 2 in May). Ready to review and sign.
deals.activity_note: Apr 17: Ruby (SOJOS) replied confirming contract updated per Kenny's request — new dates: Video 1 draft 4/23, Video 2 in May. Waiting on us to sign.

deals.notes: [Apr 16]: Reel confirmed live — Liz replied to brand confirming post went up and shared the link: instagram.com/reel/DXDLWFnjWeI/ Brand had checked in asking if it went live.
deals.activity_note: Apr 16: Reel went live — Liz confirmed in email and shared link. Moving to Delivered; ready to send invoice.

deals.notes: [Apr 16]: Ian Saunders (ian@popfly.com, Popfly agency) sent campaign upload link for submitting video drafts for review AND invoice once project is complete. Kenny shared filming timeline with Ian: Liz home weekend Apr 18–19, filming Video 1 early week of Apr 21, Steinhafels visit Apr 23, Video 1 draft by ~Apr 25, Video 2 draft early week of Apr 28–May 2 (after Steinhafels visit). Video 3 with parents planned for week of May 15 (parents fly home May 12). Ian asked which Steinhafels and hopes last video can be turned around sooner than May 12. Posting schedule: 1 week apart. Invoice submission link: app.popfly.com (Popfly campaign portal).
deals.activity_note: Apr 16: Ian (Popfly) shared campaign upload link for drafts and invoice. Kenny confirmed timeline — Video 1 draft ~Apr 25, Video 2 ~Apr 28–May 2, Video 3 ~May 15.
